---
title: "Life tables — DEMOPAST (test)"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.4/dist/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
---

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css" />
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/papaparse@5.4.1/papaparse.min.js"></script>

<div style="background:#fff3cd;border:1px solid #ffeeba;border-radius:4px;padding:0.5rem 1rem;margin-bottom:1rem;font-size:0.9rem;">
  <strong>Test section</strong> — provincial abridged life tables computed from
  deaths by age &amp; sex and census populations.
  <a href="index.html">← back to test home</a>
</div>

<div style="text-align:center;margin:1rem 0;">
  <label style="font-weight:bold;">Year: </label>
  <select id="yearSelect" style="padding:4px 8px;font-size:1rem;">
    <option value="1881">1881</option>
    <option value="1921">1921</option>
  </select>
  &nbsp;&nbsp;
  <label style="font-weight:bold;">Sex (map): </label>
  <select id="sexSelect" style="padding:4px 8px;font-size:1rem;">
    <option value="T">Total</option>
    <option value="M">Males</option>
    <option value="F">Females</option>
  </select>
  &nbsp;&nbsp;
  <span style="font-size:0.95rem;color:#555;">Map shows life expectancy at birth (e₀)</span>
</div>

<div style="display:flex;gap:1.5rem;align-items:flex-start;">
  <div style="flex:0 0 38%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.75rem;">
    <div id="map" style="width:100%;height:560px;"></div>
    <div id="legendWrapper">
      <div class="legend-header">
        <span class="legend-title">Legend</span>
        <button id="legendToggle" type="button">Hide</button>
      </div>
      <div id="legendContent" class="map-legend"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="provinceInfo" style="flex:0 0 59%;padding:1rem;background:#f8f9fa;border-radius:4px;max-height:760px;overflow-y:auto;">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:baseline;justify-content:space-between;">
      <h4 id="provName" style="margin-top:0;"></h4>
      <button id="resetProv" type="button" style="display:none;font-size:0.8rem;padding:2px 8px;cursor:pointer;">← Italia (nazionale)</button>
    </div>
    <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:0.9rem;margin-bottom:0.75rem;">
      <thead><tr style="border-bottom:2px solid #ccc;">
        <th style="text-align:left;padding:3px 4px;">Life expectancy at age…</th>
        <th style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;">0</th>
        <th style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;">1</th>
        <th style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;">5</th>
        <th style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;">15</th>
        <th style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;">30</th>
        <th style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;">50</th>
        <th style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;">65</th>
        <th style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;">80</th>
      </tr></thead>
      <tbody id="exTable"></tbody>
    </table>
    <h5 style="margin-bottom:0.25rem;">Survival curve l<sub>x</sub> (per 100,000 born)</h5>
    <div><canvas id="lxChart" style="max-height:260px;"></canvas></div>
    <h5 style="margin-top:1rem;margin-bottom:0.25rem;">Death probability q<sub>x</sub> (log scale)</h5>
    <div><canvas id="qxChart" style="max-height:220px;"></canvas></div>
    <h5 id="fullTableTitle" style="margin-top:1rem;margin-bottom:0.25rem;">Full life table</h5>
    <table id="fullTable" style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:0.8rem;margin-top:0.5rem;"></table>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const FILES = {1881: '../data/mortality/lifetables_1881.csv',
               1921: '../data/mortality/lifetables_1921.csv'};
const COLORS = ['#fff7fb','#ece2f0','#d0d1e6','#a6bddb','#67a9cf','#3690c0','#02818a','#016450'];
const SEXCLR = {M: '#1d4ed8', F: '#be123c', T: '#475569'};
const AGE_PTS = [0, 1, 5, 15, 30, 50, 65, 80];

const map = L.map('map', {zoomControl:false, attributionControl:false, dragging:false,
  scrollWheelZoom:false, doubleClickZoom:false, boxZoom:false, keyboard:false,
  touchZoom:false}).setView([41.5, 12.5], 6);

const NATIONAL = {cod: 0, name: 'Italia'};
let lt = {};          // year -> sex -> cod -> [rows by age_lo]
let geojsonCache = {}, currentLayer = null, currentBreaks = null;
let lxChart = null, qxChart = null, selected = NATIONAL;

const getYear = () => +document.getElementById('yearSelect').value;
const getSex = () => document.getElementById('sexSelect').value;

function e0(year, sex, cod) {
  const rows = ((lt[year] || {})[sex] || {})[cod];
  return rows ? rows[0].ex : null;
}

async function loadYear(year) {
  if (lt[year]) return;
  lt[year] = {T: {}, M: {}, F: {}};
  const text = await fetch(FILES[year]).then(r => r.text());
  Papa.parse(text, {header:true, skipEmptyLines:true, dynamicTyping:true}).data
    .forEach(function(r) {
      const bySex = lt[year][r.sex];
      if (!bySex) return;
      (bySex[r.COD_PROV] = bySex[r.COD_PROV] || []).push(r);
    });
  for (const s of ['T','M','F'])
    Object.values(lt[year][s]).forEach(a => a.sort((x, y) => x.age_lo - y.age_lo));
}

function computeBreaks() {
  const values = Object.entries(lt[getYear()][getSex()])
    .filter(([cod]) => +cod !== 0)   // exclude national aggregate
    .map(([, rows]) => rows[0].ex).filter(v => v != null).sort((a, b) => a - b);
  if (!values.length) return [0, 1];
  const breaks = [];
  for (let i = 1; i <= 7; i++)
    breaks.push(values[Math.min(Math.floor(values.length * i / 8), values.length - 1)]);
  return [...new Set(breaks)].sort((a, b) => a - b);
}

function getColor(v, breaks) {
  if (v == null) return '#e5e7eb';
  for (let i = breaks.length - 1; i >= 0; i--)
    if (v > breaks[i]) return COLORS[Math.min(i + 1, COLORS.length - 1)];
  return COLORS[0];
}

function style(feature) {
  const v = e0(getYear(), getSex(), feature.properties.COD_PROV);
  return {fillColor: getColor(v, currentBreaks), weight: 0.8, opacity: 1,
          color: '#94a3b8', fillOpacity: 0.85};
}

function onEachFeature(feature, layer) {
  layer.on({
    mouseover: function(e) { e.target.setStyle({weight: 2, color: '#0f766e', fillOpacity: 1}); e.target.bringToFront(); },
    mouseout: function(e) { if (currentLayer) currentLayer.resetStyle(e.target); },
    click: function() {
      selected = {cod: feature.properties.COD_PROV, name: feature.properties.DEN_PROV};
      showProvince();
    }
  });
}

function fmtAge(g) { return g === '0' ? '0' : g === '1_4' ? '1–4' : g === '85plus' ? '85+' : String(g).replace('_', '–'); }

function showProvince() {
  if (!selected) selected = NATIONAL;
  const year = getYear(), cod = selected.cod;
  const data = lt[year];
  const tRows = (data.T || {})[cod];
  const isNational = cod === NATIONAL.cod;
  document.getElementById('provinceInfo').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('resetProv').style.display = isNational ? 'none' : 'inline-block';
  document.getElementById('provName').textContent = selected.name +
    (isNational ? ' (nazionale)' : '') + ' — life table ' + year;
  if (!tRows) {
    document.getElementById('exTable').innerHTML =
      '<tr><td colspan="9">No life table for this province in ' + year + '</td></tr>';
    if (lxChart) lxChart.destroy(); if (qxChart) qxChart.destroy();
    lxChart = qxChart = null;
    document.getElementById('fullTable').innerHTML = '';
    return;
  }
  // ex summary table for T / M / F
  let html = '';
  for (const s of ['T','M','F']) {
    const rows = (data[s] || {})[cod];
    if (!rows) continue;
    const label = {T:'Total', M:'Males', F:'Females'}[s];
    html += '<tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;"><td style="padding:3px 4px;color:' +
      SEXCLR[s] + ';font-weight:bold;">' + label + '</td>' +
      AGE_PTS.map(a => {
        const r = rows.find(x => x.age_lo === a);
        return '<td style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;">' + (r ? r.ex.toFixed(1) : '—') + '</td>';
      }).join('') + '</tr>';
  }
  document.getElementById('exTable').innerHTML = html;

  const mkDatasets = field => ['M','F'].map(s => {
    const rows = (data[s] || {})[cod] || [];
    return {label: {M:'Males', F:'Females'}[s],
            data: rows.map(r => ({x: r.age_lo, y: r[field]})),
            borderColor: SEXCLR[s], backgroundColor: SEXCLR[s],
            pointRadius: 2, borderWidth: 1.5, tension: 0.2};
  });
  if (lxChart) lxChart.destroy();
  lxChart = new Chart(document.getElementById('lxChart').getContext('2d'), {
    type: 'line', data: {datasets: mkDatasets('lx')},
    options: {responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
      plugins: {legend: {position: 'bottom'}},
      scales: {x: {type: 'linear', min: 0, max: 90, title: {display: true, text: 'age'}},
               y: {min: 0, max: 100000}}}
  });
  if (qxChart) qxChart.destroy();
  qxChart = new Chart(document.getElementById('qxChart').getContext('2d'), {
    type: 'line', data: {datasets: mkDatasets('qx')},
    options: {responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
      plugins: {legend: {position: 'bottom'}},
      scales: {x: {type: 'linear', min: 0, max: 90, title: {display: true, text: 'age'}},
               y: {type: 'logarithmic'}}}
  });

  // full table follows the sex selector (fallback to total)
  const fSex = (data[getSex()] || {})[cod] ? getSex() : 'T';
  const fRows = (data[fSex] || {})[cod] || tRows;
  document.getElementById('fullTableTitle').textContent =
    'Full life table — ' + {T:'total population', M:'males', F:'females'}[fSex];
  document.getElementById('fullTable').innerHTML =
    '<tr style="border-bottom:2px solid #ccc;"><th style="text-align:left;">age</th>' +
    ['ax','mx','qx','lx','dx','Lx','Tx','ex'].map(h => '<th style="text-align:right;">' + h + '</th>').join('') + '</tr>' +
    fRows.map(r =>
      '<tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;"><td>' + fmtAge(r.age_group) + '</td>' +
      '<td style="text-align:right;">' + (r.ax != null ? r.ax.toFixed(2) : '—') + '</td>' +
      ['mx','qx'].map(k => '<td style="text-align:right;">' + r[k].toFixed(5) + '</td>').join('') +
      ['lx','dx','Lx','Tx'].map(k => '<td style="text-align:right;">' + Math.round(r[k]).toLocaleString('en-US') + '</td>').join('') +
      '<td style="text-align:right;font-weight:bold;">' + r.ex.toFixed(2) + '</td></tr>').join('');
}

async function updateMap() {
  const year = getYear();
  await loadYear(year);
  if (!geojsonCache[year]) {
    geojsonCache[year] = await fetch('../data/geojson/province_' + year + '.geojson').then(r => r.json());
  }
  currentBreaks = computeBreaks();
  if (currentLayer) map.removeLayer(currentLayer);
  currentLayer = L.geoJSON(geojsonCache[year], {style: style, onEachFeature: onEachFeature}).addTo(map);
  map.fitBounds(currentLayer.getBounds(), {padding: [10, 10]});
  updateLegend();
  showProvince();
}

document.getElementById('yearSelect').addEventListener('change', updateMap);
document.getElementById('sexSelect').addEventListener('change', updateMap);
document.getElementById('resetProv').addEventListener('click', function() {
  selected = NATIONAL;
  showProvince();
});
document.getElementById('legendToggle').addEventListener('click', function() {
  const hidden = document.getElementById('legendWrapper').classList.toggle('legend-hidden');
  this.textContent = hidden ? 'Show' : 'Hide';
});

function updateLegend() {
  const div = document.getElementById('legendContent');
  if (!div || !currentBreaks) return;
  const sexLabel = document.getElementById('sexSelect').selectedOptions[0].text;
  let html = '<strong>e₀ (' + sexLabel + '), years</strong>';
  html += '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:' + COLORS[0] + '"></i><span>&lt; ' + currentBreaks[0].toFixed(1) + '</span></div>';
  for (let i = 0; i < currentBreaks.length; i++) {
    const next = currentBreaks[i + 1];
    const clr = COLORS[Math.min(i + 1, COLORS.length - 1)];
    html += next
      ? '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:' + clr + '"></i><span>' + currentBreaks[i].toFixed(1) + '–' + next.toFixed(1) + '</span></div>'
      : '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:' + clr + '"></i><span>&gt; ' + currentBreaks[i].toFixed(1) + '</span></div>';
  }
  html += '<div class="legend-row"><i style="background:#e5e7eb"></i><span>no data</span></div>';
  div.innerHTML = html;
}

updateMap();
</script>

<div style="margin-top:2rem;padding-top:1rem;border-top:1px solid #ddd;font-size:0.9rem;color:#555;">
<p><strong>Method.</strong> Abridged period life tables by province and sex, 19 age
groups (0, 1–4, then 5-year groups to 85+), computed from deaths by age and sex
(<em>Movimento dello stato civile</em>) and census populations: <strong>1881</strong> (deaths
1879–1881 averaged around the 1881 census) and <strong>1921</strong> (deaths 1921, census 1921).
Methodology follows the <a href="https://www.mortality.org/Data/MethodsProtocol">Human
Mortality Database Methods Protocol</a> (v6): a₀ from the Andreev–Kingkade (2015)
sex-specific formulas as a function of m₀ (total sex: death-weighted average of the
male and female values); ₄a₁ = 1.5, ₙaₓ = n/2 elsewhere;
qₓ = n·mₓ / (1 + (n − aₓ)·mₓ); open interval 85+ closed with q = 1, a = 1/m, L = l/m.
Provincial tables are preliminary: small-province death counts make single-year mₓ
noisy at old ages. The national table (ITALIA, shown when no province is selected;
COD_PROV 0 in the CSVs) is computed from the sum of deaths and populations over the
tabulated provinces.</p>
<p>Compartimento-level tables for 1901, 1911, 1931 and 1936 are available below; national
e₀ from these tables matches the official ISTAT period tables (43.4 / 44.4 / 54.9 / 56.8).</p>
<p><strong>Download:</strong>
<a href="../data/mortality/lifetables_1881.csv" download>lifetables_1881.csv</a> ·
<a href="../data/mortality/lifetables_1921.csv" download>lifetables_1921.csv</a> ·
<a href="../data/mortality/lifetables_comp.csv" download>lifetables_comp.csv</a> ·
<a href="../data/mortality/e0_comp.csv" download>e0_comp.csv</a></p>
<p>Preliminary — test environment.</p>
</div>
```
